HomeIntroduction.description: Full stack developer with {years}+ years building Web, Mobile apps and APIs. From frontend to backend, any tech challenge.

Values.description: I'm a Fullstack Developer at HitCode Tecnologia, a digital solutions company that serves clients of different segments and sizes. I have {years}+ years of experience in fullstack development, both for web and mobile, using React.js, Node.js and React Native technologies. I have a bachelor's degree in Computer Science from Universidade Presbiteriana Mackenzie, where I acquired solid theoretical and practical training in programming, algorithms, data structures, databases, artificial intelligence, among other areas. Contribute to the development of new features, using best practices and code standards. I am passionate about technology, innovation and continuous learning, and I always try to stay up to date with market trends and news. My goal is to create solutions that generate value for customers and users, using my knowledge, my creativity and my leadership.

Contact.title: Contact forms
Contact.subtitle: Got a project in mind or just want to say hi? Pick the channel you prefer or drop me a message right here.

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.subtitle: A timeline of the projects that shaped my journey, from personal experiments to products in production.

privatePension.title: Private Pension
privatePension.description: Full private pension management platform split into three modules: a public institutional website, a logged area for clients (simulations, statements and benefit requests) and an admin portal to manage plans, users and requirements.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: My digital portfolio, the website you are on right now. A concise summary of my career, skills and projects, organized into About, Skills, Projects and Contact.

keychain.title: Keychain
keychain.description: A compact project to explore .NET with clean architecture. Two modules: a password sharer using temporary links that self-destruct after X views or a set date, and a simple personal password vault.

stoneEcommerce.title: Stone E-commerce
stoneEcommerce.description: B2B and B2C stone e-commerce available on web and mobile. Checkout via bank slip, card and Pix, order history and invoice registry, plus an admin area to manage delivery dates, banners and system parameters.

cementEcommerce.title: Cement E-commerce
cementEcommerce.description: B2B cement e-commerce on app and web, split into four modules: multi-CNPJ purchases with pre-approved credit and invoice lookup, training for salespeople, a public blog with a nearby-stores map and campaigns, and a full admin area.

financial.title: Financial
financial.description: Personal project to manage my own finances, with control of transactions, investments and assets through graphical indicators. Started as an app, revived as a web version in 2023 and still evolving as my needs change.

timeTracker.title: Time Tracker
timeTracker.description: An initiative to explore Flutter and improve my productivity. A time tracker with tags by category and graphical reports that highlight which tasks and projects consumed the most time each month.

eventManager.title: Event Manager
eventManager.description: Offline-first app for event organizers. Generates attendance lists, scans QRCodes on guest badges to confirm entry, and syncs data with the server once the event ends.

seedSales.title: Seed Sales
seedSales.description: Seed sales app featuring performance indicators, a full customer "dictionary" (purchase history, interactions, sale details) and Google Calendar integration to organize tasks across the team.

seedSales2.title: Seed Sales
seedSales2.description: Earlier generation of the seed sales app, with over 20 charts and a fully offline-first design, essential for salespeople visiting farms without connectivity. Data was pre-processed on the backend to keep the app fast.

seedShipping.title: Seed Shipping
seedShipping.description: Logistics app for pallet and big-bag loading control. Scans material batches, lists loading sites and gives a complete breakdown of each shipment, integrated with an ERP without a web front end.

activesMonitoring.title: Actives Monitoring
activesMonitoring.description: Asset monitoring system powered by trackable tags. I built the app that received door-crossing events, notified the security team in case of theft and displayed the asset's details and location.

medicineTracker.title: Medicine Tracker
medicineTracker.description: My first professional experience: maintaining an existing app for biological bag traceability, with GPS tracking and temperature monitoring over Bluetooth, feeding a detailed admin dashboard.

seriousGames.title: Thesis - Serious Games Learning to Code
seriousGames.description: My college thesis on Serious Games: a 2D RPG-style game that teaches programming fundamentals (commands, conditionals, functions and loops) through visual challenges, coin collecting and monster fights.

shipping.title: Shipping Manager
shipping.description: Logistics app for pallet and big-bag loading control. Scans material batches, lists loading sites and gives a complete breakdown of each shipment. Integrated with an ERP, with no web front end.

marketList.title: Market List
marketList.description: My first larger project, built to prepare for my first job. A grocery list tied to a home inventory module, with local storage on SQLite and later cloud sync via Firebase Realtime Database.
